chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI SCRA No.46 of 2012 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Hearing of case [Priority] 1. For orders on CMA No.326 of 2012 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.327 of 2012 31.01.2025 Mr. Abdul Khursheed Khan, Advocate for the Respondents ************ None present on behalf of the Applicant nor any intimation received. The matter is pending since, 2012, whereas, Counsel earlier representing the Applicant are no more on the panel of the Applicant and despite this no efforts has been made by the Applicant to engage a fresh Counsel. In view of such position, this Reference Application is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Qurban/PA*
